title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-39: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of peritoneal dialysis equipment
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-39部分：腹膜透析设备的基本安全和基本性能专用要求

standards.abstract: Particular requirements for peritoneal dialysis equipment.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-16: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of haemodialysis, haemodiafiltration and haemofiltration equipment
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-16部分：血液透析、血液透析滤过和血液滤过设备的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.abstract: Applies to the basic safety and essential performance of haemodialysis, haemodiafiltration, and haemofiltration equipment. Edition 3.

title.en: Preparation and quality management of fluids for haemodialysis and related therapies - Part 1: General requirements
title.zh: 血液透析及相关治疗用液体的制备和质量管理 - 第1部分：通用要求

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements for preparation and quality management of fluids used in haemodialysis and related therapies.
standards.scope: General requirements for dialysis fluids preparation and quality management.

title.en: Preparation and quality management of fluids for haemodialysis and related therapies - Part 3: Water for haemodialysis and related therapies

standards.scope: Water quality requirements for haemodialysis systems.

title.en: Quality of dialysis fluid for haemodialysis and related therapies
title.zh: 血液透析及相关治疗用透析液的质量

standards.abstract: Specifies minimum requirements for dialysis fluids used for haemodialysis and haemodiafiltration, including chemical and microbiological purity. Confirmed 2020.

title.en: Extracorporeal systems for blood purification - Part 1: Haemodialysers, haemodiafilters, haemofilters and haemoconcentrators

standards.scope: Extracorporeal blood purification devices (dialysers, filters, concentrators).
